chapters.title: Every Morning
chapters.content: Every morning, Mia stopped at the same coffee shop before work. She always ordered the same cappuccino and noticed the same barista smiling at her.

chapters.title: A Small Conversation
chapters.content: One rainy morning, they finally talked longer than usual. His name was Leo, and he loved old books and late-night walks.

chapters.title: An Invitation
chapters.content: Before she left, Leo wrote something on her coffee cup: 'Bookstore at 7?' Mia smiled the entire way to work.
